description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Matplotplusplus that triggers on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. The workflow has two jobs: Build and contrib-readme-job. The Build job runs on multiple platforms (Windows, Ubuntu, MacOSX) with different configurations, checking out the code, creating a build directory, configuring and building with CMake, and running tests. The contrib-readme-job runs on ubuntu-latest and updates the contribution list using the contributors-readme-action.
